title: Alabama names state’s first chief AI officer
summary: Alabama has promoted Aaron Wright, the state's director of application development, to serve as its first chief AI officer.

title: State cyber officials are losing confidence as challenges mount
summary: Between aging infrastructure, AI-powered attacks and flagging budgets, state cybersecurity officials have reported they are becoming less confident in their ability to protect government's data stores.

title: More time, stronger compliance: Accessibility leaders say their work continues after DOJ rule extension
summary: One city leader said the DOJ's extension of its accessibility rules gave her team "the opportunity to deepen that work and not rush it."

title: Oregon’s ‘digital transformation’ director steps down after six months
summary: Alex Pettit, who rejoined the state last November, has advertised on LinkedIn that he's looking for a new tech job.

title: School, library groups urge FCC not to create proposed E-Rate bidding portal
summary: A cohort of advocacy groups argued that an online E-Rate portal would be "overly burdensome" for under-resourced schools, libraries and ISPs.

title: Each state does data differently, but that might be a good thing, researchers say
summary: A new report from the Beeck Center for Social Impact and Innovation and NASCIO identifies a wide range of strategies in developing data practices inside state government.

title: Pennsylvania police roll out mobile radio tower for 2026 NFL Draft
summary: Police wheeled out the LMR-COW, a 100-foot tower mounted on a trailer, to extend radio coverage during a three-day event expected to attract hundreds of thousands of sports fans.

title: The new federal consumer privacy bill isn’t very consumer-friendly, critics say
summary: Numerous privacy analysts who've read the SECURE Data Act said that in addition to preempting years of state policy work, it would omit crucial protections for consumers.

title: Bridging the AI scalability gap: From experimentation to enterprise impact
summary: To unlock meaningful public value from AI, agency leaders must move beyond fragmented pilots and commit to a cohesive, enterprise-wide strategy that aligns technical capability with active stakeholder engagement and organizational readiness.

title: FirstNet reauthorization bill would bring stability and risk, says former DHS official
summary: A former DHS official said the FirstNet reauthorization bill approved by the House would bring stability to the public safety network, but warned that continuing to rely on a single vendor is a risk.
